approach: HMAC-SHA256 token over (workspace_id, lower(email)) in @cdp/email (sign/verify, constant-time, DEV fallback secret). Dispatcher signs token onto body {{unsubscribe}} link + List-Unsubscribe header. /unsubscribe + /manage-subscription handlers verify (403 on missing/invalid). Adaptive manage page: showTopics = topics_enabled (settings jsonb, default true) AND active topic count>0; else reuse simple unsubscribe page+write. New GET /profiles/:id/subscription-link returns tokenized url. Topics-enabled toggle in Topics tab.
notes: Part 1 (tokenization+gate) done: email unit tests (11) green, unsubscribe scoping integration (9, incl 403/forged) green. Next: adaptive page (part 3 topics), profile endpoint (part 2), dispatcher token integration, web wiring, e2e.
